languages.text: "Мы делаем успехи, Ваша Светлость. Приглашаем новых людей, налаживаем связи. Поймали пару новоприбывших писарей на воровстве и дали им шанс последнего искупления для одного". {n}Ведка выразительно смотрит в сторону листьев с телами внутри.{/n} "Работаем во славу династии и Бога-Императора".

"We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Мы делаем успехи, Ваша Светлость. Приглашаем новых людей, налаживаем связи. Поймали пару новоприбывших писарей на воровстве и дали им шанс последнего искупления для одного". {n}Ведка выразительно смотрит в сторону листьев с телами внутри.{/n} "Работаем во славу династии и Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "We are making progress, Your Lordship. We are inviting new people, forging connections. Caught a pair of newly arrived scribes in theft, and granted one of them the chance for final redemption." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

languages.text: “我们正在取得进展，大人。我们在吸纳新人，建立纽带。我们抓到了两个刚来的文书在偷东西，于是准许其中一人走向最后的赎罪。”{n}薇德卡的目光意味深长地看向那些裹着尸体的叶片。{/n}“我们为王朝与神皇的荣耀劳作。”
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “我们正在取得进展，大人。我们在吸纳新人，建立纽带。我们抓到了两个刚来的文书在偷东西，于是准许其中一人走向最后的赎罪。”{n}薇德卡的目光意味深长地看向那些裹着尸体的叶片。{/n}“我们为王朝与神皇的荣耀劳作。”

languages.text: "İlerliyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yeni insanları davet ediyor, bağlantılar kuruyoruz. Yeni gelen kâtiplerden ikisini hırsızlık yaparken yakaladık, içlerinden birine son kefaret şansını tanıdık." {n}Vedka'nın bakışları, anlamlı bir şekilde içlerinde cesetlerin bulunduğu yapraklara kayıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlığın ve Tanrı İmparator'un şanı için çalışıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "İlerliyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yeni insanları davet ediyor, bağlantılar kuruyoruz. Yeni gelen kâtiplerden ikisini hırsızlık yaparken yakaladık, içlerinden birine son kefaret şansını tanıdık." {n}Vedka'nın bakışları, anlamlı bir şekilde içlerinde cesetlerin bulunduğu yapraklara kayıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlığın ve Tanrı İmparator'un şanı için çalışıyoruz."

languages.text: « Nous faisons des progrès, Votre Seigneurie. Nous invitons des visiteurs, nous nouons des liens. Nous avons pris deux voleurs la main dans le sac, des scribes que nous avions récemment accueillis, et avons accordé à l'un d'eux la chance de l'expiation finale, » {n}déclare Vedka en lançant un regard lourd de sens aux feuilles enveloppant les cadavres.{/n} « Nous œuvrons pour la gloire de la dynastie et de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Nous faisons des progrès, Votre Seigneurie. Nous invitons des visiteurs, nous nouons des liens. Nous avons pris deux voleurs la main dans le sac, des scribes que nous avions récemment accueillis, et avons accordé à l'un d'eux la chance de l'expiation finale, » {n}déclare Vedka en lançant un regard lourd de sens aux feuilles enveloppant les cadavres.{/n} « Nous œuvrons pour la gloire de la dynastie et de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «Estamos progresando, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Estamos invitando a gente nueva y forjando relaciones. Descubrimos a un par de escribas recién llegados robando y le otorgamos a uno la oportunidad de obtener la expiación final». {n}La mirada de Vedka reposa sobre las hojas que envuelven los cadáveres.{/n} «Trabajamos para mayor gloria de la dinastía y del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Estamos progresando, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Estamos invitando a gente nueva y forjando relaciones. Descubrimos a un par de escribas recién llegados robando y le otorgamos a uno la oportunidad de obtener la expiación final». {n}La mirada de Vedka reposa sobre las hojas que envuelven los cadáveres.{/n} «Trabajamos para mayor gloria de la dinastía y del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: "Wir machen Fortschritte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir laden neue Leute ein, knüpfen Verbindungen. Wir haben zwei neu angekommene Schreiber beim Stehlen erwischt und einem von ihnen die Chance auf Sühne gewährt." {n}Vedkas Blick wandert bedeutungsvoll zu den von Blättern umhüllten Leichen.{/n} "Wir arbeiten für den Ruhm der Dynastie und des Gottimperators."
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Wir machen Fortschritte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir laden neue Leute ein, knüpfen Verbindungen. Wir haben zwei neu angekommene Schreiber beim Stehlen erwischt und einem von ihnen die Chance auf Sühne gewährt." {n}Vedkas Blick wandert bedeutungsvoll zu den von Blättern umhüllten Leichen.{/n} "Wir arbeiten für den Ruhm der Dynastie und des Gottimperators."

languages.text: 「進歩しています、御{mf|殿|殿}。新たな仲間を迎え、繋がりを築いています。新参の書記二人を盗みで捕らえ、その一人の最終贖罪の機会を与えました。{n}ヴェドカの視線は意味深に、遺体の入った葉に向かいます.{/n}「我々は王朝と神皇帝の栄光のために働く」
languages.original_text: "We are making progress, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We are inviting new people, forging connections. We caught a pair of newly arrived scribes thieving, and granted one of them the chance for final atonement." {n}Vedka's gaze drifts meaningfully toward the leaves with the bodies within.{/n} "We labour for the glory of the dynasty and the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 「進歩しています、御{mf|殿|殿}。新たな仲間を迎え、繋がりを築いています。新参の書記二人を盗みで捕らえ、その一人の最終贖罪の機会を与えました。{n}ヴェドカの視線は意味深に、遺体の入った葉に向かいます.{/n}「我々は王朝と神皇帝の栄光のために働く」
